overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City's urban highway system at night. The journey transitions from elevated overpasses through an enclosed tunnel, then navigates major intersections at Valencia and San Joaquin streets with moderate traffic and neon-lit futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with directional signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through elevated highway interchange following road signs toward Morgue and El Camino Real

entered.detail: large concrete and steel highway structure with multiple levels
green highway sign with white text indicating Morgue direction
green highway sign with white text for El Camino Real
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
elevated train or monorail tracks running parallel to highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through an elevated highway interchange beneath massive concrete overpasses. Green directional signs for Morgue and El Camino Real are visible ahead, with yellow zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt. The futuristic city skyline is visible in the background through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass tunnel with emergency lighting

events.description: enters enclosed tunnel underpass with artificial lighting and red emergency reflectors on walls

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed tunnel section with reduced visibility and artificial lighting

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the underpass tunnel
horizontal red emergency lights and reflectors mounted on tunnel walls
overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a fully enclosed concrete tunnel with artificial fluorescent lighting and red emergency reflectors lining the walls. The space is narrow and sheltered from weather, with a single vehicle visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road approaching Valencia intersection with neon signage

events.description: exits tunnel into open urban street with visible skyline and approaching Valencia intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching traffic light at Valencia intersection, slowing down while navigating through moderate traffic

entered.detail: red and white street sign indicating Valencia Street suspended over road
overhead metal structure supporting traffic lights and street signs
tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows rising in the distance
bright neon advertisements and store signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens onto a wet urban arterial road with the Valencia Street sign visible ahead. Futuristic skyscrapers dominate the skyline while neon commercial signage illuminates the sides of the street. The vehicle approaches the intersection through moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection at Valencia Street with traffic control and pedestrian crossings

events.description: comes to complete stop at red traffic light at Valencia intersection
traffic light changes to green and vehicle proceeds through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light waiting for signal change, then proceeding straight through the Valencia intersection

notable_agents.action: individual pedestrian crossing the street from right to left on the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
brightly lit shop fronts and commercial entrances at street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at the red light at the Valencia intersection, waiting alongside other traffic. A pedestrian crosses on the right while neon-lit storefronts line the street. After the light turns green, the vehicle proceeds through the crosswalk markings toward the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection at San Joaquin Street with multiple crossing pedestrians and elevated ramps

events.description: begins left turn maneuver at San Joaquin intersection navigating through crosswalk with pedestrians
completes left turn and continues driving along multi-lane urban street

agents.ego_description: executing left turn at San Joaquin intersection while navigating around pedestrians in the crosswalk and other vehicles

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the marked crosswalk ahead of the vehicle
black sedan completing left turn ahead of the ego vehicle

entered.detail: red and white street sign indicating San Joaquin Street suspended over the intersection
curved elevated highway on-ramp with support columns
large illuminated digital billboard displaying commercial advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the San Joaquin intersection and executes a left turn through a busy crosswalk filled with pedestrians. An elevated highway ramp curves overhead on the left while large digital billboards illuminate the scene. After completing the turn, the vehicle continues along the multi-lane street lined with commercial buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic urban landscape that transitions from elevated highway overpasses into an enclosed tunnel before opening onto neon-lit city streets. It begins beneath massive concrete interchanges and green directional signs on wet asphalt, with the hazy city skyline looming in the distance. The camera then moves into a narrow, enclosed concrete tunnel illuminated by fluorescent lights and red reflectors before emerging back into the open air onto a wet arterial road. As the vehicle approaches the Valencia Street intersection, the scene expands into a vibrant district of towering skyscrapers and glowing commercial signage, pausing briefly at a red light beside pedestrians. Finally, the vehicle proceeds through the intersection and executes a left turn at San Joaquin, passing under a curving highway ramp and beneath massive digital billboards as it continues along a multi-lane commercial corridor.
